title: Carpet Blue Addition
description: A carpet addition originally for Ssfs server , including some features introduced from higher Minecraft versions.
body:
# Carpet Blue Addition

This is a carpet extension, including some feature introduced from higher Minecraft versions.

为技术生存提供的的[地毯](https://github.com/gnembon/fabric-carpet)附属，提供了一些高版本特性<del>和not vanilla的轮椅</del>移植

## Features
### - **BugFix**
  
  Loot Fix for cross-dimension projectile Entity
  
### - **Modified Features**
  
  PowderSnow-liked CobWeb block
  
  soft crying obsidian
  
### - **Introduced Features from higher version**
  
  1.Sound Suppressor
  
  2.K_Explosion
  
  3.Ender Pearl Load Ticket
  
  4.Sculk Catalyst
  
  5.New Witch Drop
  
(For further information, please read the link below)

## Link

Github [https://github.com/blue0666/CarpetBlueAddition](https://github.com/blue0666/CarpetBlueAddition)

Mcmod [https://www.mcmod.cn/class/19629.html](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/19629.html)
